title: pseudognaphalium heterotrichum
intro: Pseudognaphalium heterotrichum, also known as California everlasting, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium heterotrichum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Pseudognaphalium heterotrichum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine practices.
